title: dendrolobium lanceolatum var. microcarpum
intro: Dendrolobium lanceolatum var. microcarpum, also known as the Small-fruited Dendrolobium, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to Australia. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Dendrolobium lanceolatum var. microcarpum can be made into a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
